section_name: Replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material
text:
(1) A person commits the offense of replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material if the person makes or procures the replacement of windows or windshields in a motor vehicle and the replacement is made with a material that does not meet the standards established by the Department of Transportation under ORS 815.040 (Standards for window and windshield material) .

(2) This section does not apply to vehicles that are exempt under ORS 815.210 (Operation of vehicle without approved material in windows) from the prohibitions against operating a vehicle without approved materials in the vehicle windows.

(3) The offense described in this section, replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material, is a Class A misdemeanor. [1983 c.338 §455; 2003 c.158 §4]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.090 — Replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material

(1) A person commits the offense of replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material if the person makes or procures the replacement of windows or windshields in a motor vehicle and the replacement is made with a material that does not meet the standards established by the Department of Transportation under ORS 815.040 (Standards for window and windshield material) .

(2) This section does not apply to vehicles that are exempt under ORS 815.210 (Operation of vehicle without approved material in windows) from the prohibitions against operating a vehicle without approved materials in the vehicle windows.

(3) The offense described in this section, replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material, is a Class A misdemeanor. [1983 c.338 §455; 2003 c.158 §4]

subsections.text: A person commits the offense of replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material if the person makes or procures the replacement of windows or windshields in a motor vehicle and the replacement is made with a material that does not meet the standards established by the Department of Transportation under ORS 815.040 (Standards for window and windshield material) .

This section does not apply to vehicles that are exempt under ORS 815.210 (Operation of vehicle without approved material in windows) from the prohibitions against operating a vehicle without approved materials in the vehicle windows.
The offense described in this section, replacement of vehicle windows with unapproved material, is a Class A misdemeanor. [1983 c.338 §455; 2003 c.158 §4]
